arguments_redacted.title: Neighborhood Cookout Plan
arguments_redacted.content:
## Summer Cookout Plan

Join your neighbors for a relaxed afternoon cookout in the community park. We'll fire up the grill, share potluck sides, and enjoy lawn games while the kids run around. Bring a folding chair, a dish to pass, and your favorite summer drink.

### Preparation

- Confirm the grill, propane, and serving tables are reserved by the Thursday before.
- Coordinate the potluck sign-up sheet so we have a balance of sides, desserts, and drinks.
- Post weather updates and the final headcount in the neighborhood group chat the morning of the cookout.

[View menu](#menu)
